race.comment: BOUTIQUE BELLE (10) made good late ground last start to grab second over 1200m here. Peaking now fourth-up and draws kinder for Pike. Looks the one to beat. PREMIUM BOY (2) was good on debut when warming nicely late to finish just shy of the placing. Is sure to have come on from that and if they can utilise the inside draw this time, he will prove tough to stop. PHOTOSYNTHESIS (12) fair debut when fifth at Ascot over 1200m starting at $17. Gets the blinkers applied and can only be improved. PLAYA DEL SOL (9) pushed forward from a wide draw last time out and found the front, holding the lead for most of the way and sticking on well to finish third. Rock-hard fit now and is worth following up on. UNIVERSAL TALK (1) was prominent at the turn and finished third last time. Strips fitter third-up and there's no reason he can't go a couple better.
